heading: Huntley vs Huntleys Cove — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Huntley, New South Wales and Huntleys Cove, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Huntley has a lower overall climate risk score (41/100) compared to Huntleys Cove (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Huntley or Huntleys Cove safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Huntley has a flood risk score of 26/100, while Huntleys Cove scores 34/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Huntley scores 49/100 for bushfire risk. Huntleys Cove scores 47/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Huntley or Huntleys Cove?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Huntley has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
